prompt.content:
Calculate the Amortization Horizon (the number of months required to recover the tax asset) for the Audit-Identified Deferred Tax Asset (DTA) by analyzing the velocity of manual revenue timing adjustments recorded in the 2023 fiscal year in Xero.

Assumptions:
Use the Correct Net DTA from the Deferred Tax Rollforward as the target amount to be recovered.
For the journals, get only manual journals in the 2023 fiscal year that contain the keywords "ASC 606", "OEM", or "Deferral" in their reference.
Use the Combined Statutory Tax Rate from Federal and State to determine the monthly tax benefit.

Requirement:
Present the final Amortization Horizon in months, rounded to one decimal place in the console.

rubrics.name: States that the time (in months) required for the monthly tax benefits to... (ver_eb9b825a904747639927e70d78a04edf)

messages.content: States that the time (in months) required for the monthly tax benefits to fully offset the target DTA balance in 2023 is 61.1 months (acceptable range 60.5 to 61.7).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: The time (in months) required for the monthly tax benefits to fully offset the target DTA balance is 61.1 months
